query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, cp.hourlyRateCents/100 as hourly_rate_usd, cp.profileActive, u.stripeConnectAccountId
FROM users u
INNER JOIN coach_profiles cp ON u.id = cp.userId
ORDER BY cp.profileActive DESC, u.id DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user o7gqiRJAqhDK5GQ.9c38f5a63e4d --database Xkyng35xnYFybYAdmyVo96 --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, cp.hourlyRateCents/100 as hourly_rate_usd, cp.profileActive, u.stripeConnectAccountId
FROM users u
INNER JOIN coach_profiles cp ON u.id = cp.userId
ORDER BY cp.profileActive DESC, u.id DESC;
